name: read_file
description: Read and display the contents of a text file. This is the PRIMARY and RECOMMENDED method for viewing file contents - always use this instead of 'run_shell' with 'cat' or similar commands when you need to see what is inside a file. This tool is purpose-built for safe, efficient file reading without invoking a shell. Always prefer this tool over shell-based alternatives.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the text file you want to read. Use this to inspect configuration files, source code, logs, or any other text-based files.
